---
title: "Morgane Hoffmann"
image: HOFFMAN_Morgane_RETOUCHE.JPG
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/morgane-hoffmann/
    - text: Email
      url: mailto:morgane.hoffmann.pro@gmail.com
---
        
**Research interests**: Causal inference, AI ethics and fairness, Labor economics

I am a Data Scientist at Malt, specializing in decision science and causal inference. I hold a PhD in Economics from CREST (ENSAE - Polytechnique).

My work combines econometrics and machine learning to study AI systems in labor markets, with a particular focus on understanding and mitigating biases in algorithmic hiring and talent-matching platforms.
